{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Outlet Auditor",
  "description": "Tastee Fried Chicken was founded by Olayinka Pamela Adedayo. It began as an extension of Tastee Pot, an outdoor catering company serving Nigerian and continental food at special events. The catering company still exists as Tastee Fried Chicken&#39;s catering operation. In 1997 Mrs. Adedayo incorporated Tastee Fried Chicken and opened her first location in Surulere, Lagos State. She based her restaurant on the business model of the American fast food chicken restaurant Kentucky Fried Chicken, where she had previously worked as a manager. Since opening its first location, it has grown to 14 restaurants.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Outlet Auditor
Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities


	Reconciliation of stock at the front end
	Cash count of main cash (sales) and petty cash with the cashier.
	Cash evacuation at the front end and reconciliation of machine print out receipts.
	Physical verification of all supplies from Warehouse/ CPU and suppliers of perishable and non-perishable items
	Signing of all authorized expenses in the outlet in accordance with approval
	Auditing of Product Transfer Note (PTN) and comparison with Product Movement form (PMF).
	Review of daily product comparative analysis (DPCS) report to ascertain product shortages
	Material usage report
	Daily stock taking of closing items at the production unit
	Review of stock control sheet from production unit.
	Review of accounts payable report
	Review of the bank lodgments.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@tfc.com.ng&nbsp;or&nbsp;qsrjobslagos@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-03-16",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Tastee Fried Chicken"
    
  },

Outlet Auditor Job at Tastee Fried Chicken




        
    

        
        Tastee Fried Chicken was founded by Olayinka Pamela Adedayo. It began as an extension of Tastee Pot, an outdoor catering company serving Nigerian and continental food at special events. The catering company still exists as Tastee Fried Chicken's catering operation. In 1997 Mrs. Adedayo incorporated Tastee Fried Chicken and opened her first location in Surulere, Lagos State. She based her restaurant on the business model of the American fast food chicken restaurant Kentucky Fried Chicken, where she had previously worked as a manager. Since opening its first location, it has grown to 14 restaurants.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Outlet Auditor
Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities


	Reconciliation of stock at the front end
	Cash count of main cash (sales) and petty cash with the cashier.
	Cash evacuation at the front end and reconciliation of machine print out receipts.
	Physical verification of all supplies from Warehouse/ CPU and suppliers of perishable and non-perishable items
	Signing of all authorized expenses in the outlet in accordance with approval
	Auditing of Product Transfer Note (PTN) and comparison with Product Movement form (PMF).
	Review of daily product comparative analysis (DPCS) report to ascertain product shortages
	Material usage report
	Daily stock taking of closing items at the production unit
	Review of stock control sheet from production unit.
	Review of accounts payable report
	Review of the bank lodgments.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@tfc.com.ng or qsrjobslagos@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Hospital Operations Manager",
  "description": "Talentforge Solutions Limited (Nigeria) is an HR consulting firm in Lagos focused on recruitment, training, and outsourcing, aiming to link top talent with leading companies through integrity and innovation in HR services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hospital Operations Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Anthony, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We&#39;re looking for an experienced Operations Manager to join our team!


Responsibilities


	Oversee daily hospital operations, ensuring efficient service delivery
	Manage administrative staff and coordinate office activities
	Implement policies and procedures to enhance patient care and satisfaction
	Monitor budgets, supplies, and equipment maintenance
	Collaborate with medical staff to optimize workflow and patient outcomes


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s degree in Healthcare Management, Business Administration, or related field
	3+ years of operations and office management experience in a healthcare setting
	Strong leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills.


Salary
N250,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;resume@talentforgesolutions.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Hospital Operations Manager Job at Talentforge Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Talentforge Solutions Limited (Nigeria) is an HR consulting firm in Lagos focused on recruitment, training, and outsourcing, aiming to link top talent with leading companies through integrity and innovation in HR services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hospital Operations Manager
Job Location: Anthony, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We're looking for an experienced Operations Manager to join our team!


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Oversee daily hospital operations, ensuring efficient service delivery
	Manage administrative staff and coordinate office activities
	Implement policies and procedures to enhance patient care and satisfaction
	Monitor budgets, supplies, and equipment maintenance
	Collaborate with medical staff to optimize workflow and patient outcomes


Requirements


	Bachelor's degree in Healthcare Management, Business Administration, or related field
	3+ years of operations and office management experience in a healthcare setting
	Strong leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills.


Salary
N250,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: resume@talentforgesolutions.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

As a business registered with us, you get a highly customizable and easy-to-use platform that gives you access to all payment gateways. Our mission is to help you deal with the headache of receiving and making payments while you focus on delivering value to your customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fraud Analyst (NYSC)
Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: NYSC

Requirements


	Interested candidates&nbsp;should possess relevant qualifications and experience.
	Must be a current NYSC member in Ibadan, Oyo State.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CVs and cover letters to:&nbsp;hr@1appgo.com&nbsp;using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the email.

Fraud Analyst (NYSC) Job at 1App




        
    

        
        1app is a payment processing aggregator that allows you to receive and make payments with ease and without a website or an integration. As a business registered with us, you get a highly customizable and easy-to-use platform that gives you access to all payment gateways. Our mission is to help you deal with the headache of receiving and making payments while you focus on delivering value to your customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fraud Analyst (NYSC)
Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: NYSC

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications and experience.
	Must be a current NYSC member in Ibadan, Oyo State.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CVs and cover letters to: hr@1appgo.com using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the email.

Note: Accommodation is provided.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Content Creator (NYSC) Job at 1App




        
    

        
        1App is a payment processing aggregator that allows you to receive and make payments with ease and without a website or an integration. As a business registered with us, you get a highly customizable and easy-to-use platform that gives you access to all payment gateways. Our mission is to help you deal with the headache of receiving and making payments while you focus on delivering value to your customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Posiiton: Content Creator (NYSC)
Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: NYSC

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications and experience.
	Must be a current NYSC member in Ibadan, Oyo State.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CVs and cover letters to: hr@1appgo.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Accommodation is provided.    

    

        Click here to Apply
